Features

Everything you need between upload and answer.

No code. No modelling. No "first set up the warehouse." Just the analysis layer, working out of the box.

1. Smart upload

CSV and Excel up to 200 MB. Automatic encoding, delimiter, and header detection. Multi-sheet Excel supported (one dataset per sheet).

2. Auto-cleaning pipeline

Trim Whitespace · Drop Duplicates · Infer Types · Handle Missing Values · Detect Outliers · plus inserted custom substeps (Drop Column, Rename Column, Replace Values). Reorderable, toggleable, and saveable as a recipe.

3. Descriptive statistics

Per-column 5-number summary, mean, std, mode, missing-rate, and unique-count — with currency codes and your preferred number/date formats applied automatically.

4. Interactive visualisations

Bar, scatter, box, pie, line, and heatmap — all powered by Plotly. Each chart links back to the underlying rows.

5. ML & K-Means clustering

Risk clustering with scatter visualisations, K choice via elbow + silhouette, and Random Forest predictions in a separate ML tab.

6. Predictive analytics

Linear models, trend analysis, and Random Forest regression with built-in train/test splits and reported MAPE / RMSE.

7. AI chat assistant

GPT-powered, dataset-aware chat. Ask "what changed since last quarter?" or "which segment is driving churn?" and get a sourced answer.

8. Time-period comparison

Save snapshots of your dataset by time period, then diff them — find drift, growth, or anomalies before they hit a board slide.

9. Reports & export

Tier 3 export: full PDF/HTML report with the cleaning recipe, key stats, charts, and AI-written narrative for stakeholders.

10. Reusable cleaning recipes

Save the exact sequence of substeps and replay it on next month's file in one click — the difference between cleaning once and cleaning forever.

Frequently asked questions

Can I reorder the cleaning steps?

Yes — every substep can be moved up/down or toggled off. The pipeline replays from scratch every time the order changes, so the result is always reproducible.

Does the AI chat see my whole dataset?

It sees a structured summary (schema, stats, samples) — never the raw rows in their entirety, which keeps prompts fast and your data exposure minimal.

What ML models are included?

Linear and Random Forest regression, Random Forest classification, and K-Means clustering. More models are on the roadmap.

Can I export reports?

Tier 3 users can export full reports including the cleaning recipe, statistics, charts, and AI-generated narrative.

See it on your own data.

60-day Tier 3 trial. No credit card.

Launch the app →

An intelligent data analytics platform that turns raw datasets into clear, actionable insights — in seconds, no code required.
